text:
The Lead East Gorteau Dancer was a dancer who came to the Royal Palace of the Republic of East Gorteau to perform for its supreme leader. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 21, Chapter 216 

Appearance

The Dancer has fair short hair and wears a tight leotard, furry cuffs around her wrists and ankles, and cat ears. 

Personality

Her professional persona comes off as exuberant and giving an off effervescent dances while prominently showing off booty swinging moves. 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

She is part of a dancing troupe summoned to the Royal Palace of East Gorteau to perform for Ming Jol-ik. Ming Jol-ik watches the dance troupe's performance while having lunch and is delighted whenever the Lead Dancer would twirl during the performance. Upon seeing King Meruem and his three Royal Guards enter the room, Ming Jol-ik taunts and threatens them, but to no avail and is instantly killed by the Chimera Ant King. Witnessing this, the dancers are terrified and are seen huddling together in a corner, begging for mercy. Amused, Meruem denies them mercy and questions them if they have ever listened to the cries and pleas of cows and pigs when slaughtering them, and presumably kills all of them immediately after. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 21, Chapter 217
